Package index

All functions

mod_puls_routing()
Modified Puls Reservoir Routing
cc_resmodel
Cherry Cricket Dam Reservoir Model
cc_inflowhydro
Cherry Cricket Dam Inflow Hydrograph
cc_init_elev
Cherry Cricket Dam Initial Elevation
cc_hms_results
Cherry Cricket Dam HEC-HMS Routing Results
jmd_resmodel
Jay McGraw Dam Reservoir Model
scale_hydrograph()
Scale Hydrograph
jmd_por_inflow
Jay McGraw Dam Period of Record Inflow
jmd_empirical_stage_wy1980_pt
Jay McGraw Dam Empirical Stage-Frequency with Perception Threshold
jmd_hydro_apr1999
Jay McGraw Dam April 1999 Hydrograph
jmd_hydro_jun1921
Jay McGraw Dam June 1921 Hydrograph
jmd_hydro_jun1965
Jay McGraw Dam June 1965 Hydrograph
jmd_hydro_may1955
Jay McGraw Dam May 1955 Hydrograph
jmd_hydro_pmf
Jay McGraw Dam PMF Hydrograph
jmd_hydro_sdf
Jay McGraw Dam SDF Hydrograph
jmd_seasonality
Jay McGraw Dam Flood Seasonality
jmd_stage_duration
Jay McGraw Dam Monthly Stage Duration Curves
jmd_wy1980_stage
Jay McGraw Dam Stage (WY 1980-2024)
jmd_vfc_parameters
Jay McGraw Dam VFC Parameters
jmd_vfc
Jay McGraw Dam Volume-Frequency Curve
qp3()
Pearson Type III Inverse CDF (Quantile Function)
stratified_sampler()
Stratified Sampler for Monte Carlo Simulation
flow_frequency_sampler()
Flow Frequency Sampler
hydrograph_setup()
Hydrograph Setup for RFA Simulation
jmd_hydro_jun1965_15min
Jay McGraw Dam June 1965 Hydrograph (15 minute intervals)
jmd_bf_parameter_sets
Jay McGraw Dam BestFit Parameter Sets
jmd_rfa_expected
Jay McGraw Dam RFA Results - Expected Only
jmd_rfa_full
Jay McGraw Dam RFA Results - Full Uncertainty
bootstrap_vfc()
Bootstrap option for VFC (RFA-style w/ ERL)
example_stratified
Stratified Sampling - Example Data
flow_frequency_sampler_expected()
Flow Frequency Sampler (Expected Only)
rfa_simulate()
RFA Stage-Frequency Simulation
aep2stage()
Interpolate Stage from AEP
stage2aep()
Interpolate AEP from Stage
theme_rfar_conceptual()
rfaR ggplot theme for conceptual example

Developed by Daniel McGraw, Andrew Verdin, C. Haden Smith.
